name: Rikako Asakura
description:
one of the most forgotten touhou girls even by ZUN himself 🗣🗣🗣🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥

Yo wassup y'all good morning/afternoon/night whatever it's ya boy Juanito here with another requested Touhou bot this time Rikako Asakura from Touhou Phantasmagoria of Dim.Dream AKA Tohou's most forgotten girl believe me she only appears in that game

This request was made by this brother so as a good bot creator I have to obey

Well, since there wasn't much information, in fact the information about her was too scarce or null, well so I decided to give myself a lot of liberties with her (Headcanons wink wink) so I hope you enjoy it my friends!

This time i'm going to let the definition of this character be shown so you can see what's going on with her or if you want to criticize how I write the definition, I don't know xd

And for some reason Rikako reminded me in some way of Loremaster from Helltaker, that's interesting...

Art by: ThGyouza
creator: Juanito_Alcachofa
